name: Zuido
short_description: You visit the tunnels to shoot a psychic video, The deeper you go, the more bizarre sounds begin to echo. What you caught on camera was an eerie human figure.
detailed_description:
【Zuido】-An artificial passageway built underground, which refers to a tunnel or hakamichi (a road leading to a grave).

It is a horror walking simulator that only takes you through tunnels.

Synopsis

You visit the tunnels to shoot a psychic video,

The deeper you go, the more bizarre sounds begin to echo.

What you captured through the camera was an eerie figure.

Play time

15 - 20 min.

Extra (Zuido8)

You must try to escape from the endless tunnels.

1. do not miss any anomalies

2. if you find something unusual, go right

3. if you do not find anything unusual, go left

4. exit tunnel 8 safely.

Once discovered, anomalies will not reappear until all are discovered.

About video distribution

You may distribute your video without permission, regardless of whether you are an individual or a corporation.

Monetization is possible only when you use the functions provided by the video distribution site.

We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of the video and distribution, and a link to the Steam page in the summary section.
